title: CDSL South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CDSL South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CDSL South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Coimbatore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CDSL South Asia Partners:
CDSL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL South Asia Partners!
